title: Building archaeology informative modelling turned into 3D volume stratigraphy and extended reality time-lapse communication

paper_analysis.summary: The paper presents a 3D HBIM and volume-stratigraphy workflow for documenting and communicating the damaged church of St. Francesco using laser scanning and photogrammetry data.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper describes a 3D HBIM and volume-stratigraphy workflow based on laser scanning and photogrammetry data for the damaged church of St. Francesco, but no accessible dataset location is provided in the available information.
